indicators.name: large open space
indicators.rationale: The open space lacks a dedicated area for focused work, making it difficult to set up a workstation.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height suitable for placing a laptop or keyboard.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: There is no chair or seating arrangement that would allow for comfortable prolonged sitting while working.

indicators.name: ambient lighting
indicators.rationale: Ambient lighting does not provide sufficient task illumination for screen work.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The large open space and lack of flat personal work surface make it challenging to set up a workstation. There is no ergonomic seating available, and the ambient lighting is insufficient for screen work. However, the presence of a television and potted plants suggests some level of comfort and personalization, which could be beneficial for some users.
